title: AMC Entertainment Q4 2023 Earnings Preview
text: AMC Entertainment was scheduled to report fourth-quarter 2023 results on February 28, 2024. Expected loss per share was 70 cents compared to prior-year loss of $1.40 per share. Revenue consensus was $1.06 billion (7.4% growth year-over-year from $990.9 million). Strong increase in attendance fueled by quality movie titles would support revenue growth. Additional factors included enhanced concession offerings and theater expansion across the United States, Europe, and the Middle East. Revenue projections by category included: Admissions $592 million (5.5% increase), Food and beverage $431 million (7.9% increase), and Other theater revenue $103 million (17.3% increase). The Zacks model predicted an earnings beat, with an Earnings ESP of +6.67%. The company ultimately beat FactSet and Refinitiv consensus estimates. Taylor Swift's The Eras Tour, distributed by AMC, led the way, with fourth quarter consolidated revenue increasing by 11.5% to $1.1 billion.
